mapper.insert: insert into tbl_reply (reply_content, member_id, review_id) values(#{replyContent}, #{memberId}, #{reviewId})
insert into tbl_reply(parent_id, reply_content, depth, member_id, review_id) values(#{parentId}, #{replyContent}, #{depth}, #{memberId}, #{reviewId})
mapper.select: select max(depth) + 1 from tbl_reply where parent_id = #{parentId}
select ifnull(max(depth) + 1, 2) from tbl_reply where parent_id = #{parentId}

select m.member_email, m.member_password, m.member_name, m.member_status, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, p.post_title, p.post_content, p.post_read_count, p.member_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, r.id, r.parent_id, r.reply_content, r.depth, r.member_id, r.review_id, r.created_datetime, r.updated_datetime from tbl_member m join tbl_post p on m.id = p.member_id join tbl_reply r on m.id = r.member_id where r.id = #{id}

select m.member_email, m.member_password, m.member_name, m.member_status, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, p.post_title, p.post_content, p.post_read_count, p.member_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, r.id, r.parent_id, r.reply_content, r.depth, r.member_id, r.review_id, r.created_datetime, r.updated_datetime from tbl_member m join tbl_post p on m.id = p.member_id join tbl_reply r on m.id = r.member_id where p.id = #{reviewId} and r.depth = 1

select m.member_email, m.member_password, m.member_name, m.member_status, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, p.post_title, p.post_content, p.post_read_count, p.member_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, r.id, r.parent_id, r.reply_content, r.depth, r.member_id, r.review_id, r.created_datetime, r.updated_datetime from tbl_member m join tbl_post p on m.id = p.member_id join tbl_reply r on m.id = r.member_id where r.parent_id = #{replyId}
